title: Lemon Garlic Shrimp Linguine
description: Quick and bright shrimp pasta with garlic, lemon, and parsley — perfect for weeknights.
author: Chef Luca
steps: Cook linguine until al dente and reserve 1/2 cup pasta water.
Sauté garlic in olive oil until fragrant, add shrimp and cook until pink.
Add lemon zest, juice, and a splash of pasta water. Toss with linguine and parsley.

title: Mediterranean Chickpea Salad
description: A refreshing salad with chickpeas, cucumber, cherry tomatoes, olives, and a lemon-oregano dressing.
author: Olivia Greens
steps: Combine chickpeas, cucumber, tomatoes, olives, and red onion in a bowl.
Whisk olive oil, lemon juice, oregano, salt, and pepper. Pour over salad and toss.

title: Coconut Lime Vegan Tacos
description: Flavorful jackfruit tacos with coconut-lime slaw and a spicy crema — plant-based and delicious.
author: Green Kitchen
steps: Simmer jackfruit with coconut milk and curry powder until tender and shredded.
Mix cabbage with lime juice and a pinch of salt for the slaw.
Assemble tacos with jackfruit and slaw. Serve with extra lime.

title: Salted Caramel Panna Cotta
description: Silky panna cotta topped with a buttery salted caramel sauce.
author: Pastry Chef Lina
steps: Bloom gelatin in a little cold water.
Heat cream, sugar, and vanilla until sugar dissolves. Whisk in gelatin.
Pour into molds and chill until set. Top with salted caramel.

title: Smoky Grilled Mackerel
description: Simple grilled mackerel with a smoky char and lemon-herb finish.
author: Fisher Sam
steps: Score the fish and rub with oil, salt, and pepper.
Grill on high heat for 4-5 minutes per side until charred and cooked.
Serve with lemon and fresh dill.
